app.title: Susu Reference App
app.tagline: A reference UX surface for the Susu Protocol monorepo.
app.getStarted: To get started, edit the page.tsx file.

errors.GroupFull: This group has reached its maximum member count. Try a smaller group or wait for a future group.
errors.GroupAlreadyStarted: This group has already started. Create a new group or choose one that is still forming.
errors.MemberNotInvited: This wallet is not invited to the group. Check the invite address or ask the creator to invite you.
errors.InvalidMemberCount: The member count is outside the supported range. Choose a group size between the configured minimum and maximum.
errors.MintNotSupported: This token mint is not supported for the group. Select a supported mint before creating or joining.
errors.GroupCancelled: This group has been cancelled. Wait for the creator to form a new group or select another active invite.
errors.AlreadyAccepted: This invite has already been accepted. Continue with the existing member position instead of retrying.
errors.GroupNotActive: This group is not active yet. Wait until the group activates before sending contributions, or select another active group.
errors.OutsideContributionWindow: Contributions are only accepted during the scheduled window for this rotation. Check the group's rotation timing and try again inside the open window.
errors.ContributionAmountMismatch: The amount sent does not match this group's fixed contribution. Resubmit using the exact contribution amount configured on the group.
errors.MemberSlashedCannotContribute: This member position was slashed and can no longer contribute. Contact the group admin or choose a different wallet or group.
errors.ContributionAlreadyRecorded: You already recorded a contribution for this rotation. Wait for the next rotation or verify on-chain history before retrying.
errors.InvalidContributionRotation: That rotation index is not valid for this group's size. Use a rotation within the group's member count and try again.
errors.InvalidCurveParams: Curve inputs are outside the supported range. Check group size and rotation slot.
errors.GroupIdMismatch: The group id in the transaction does not match this group account. Reload group details and retry.
errors.MemberPositionMismatch: This member position does not match your wallet or this group.
errors.CurveOverflow: Collateral math overflowed. Use smaller amounts or contact support if this seems wrong.
errors.InsufficientCollateral: Your posted collateral plus this top-up is still below the minimum required by the curve. Increase the amount or wait until you can post more.
errors.ContributionPeriodOpen: This rotation is still inside its contribution period. Wait until the deadline has passed, then retry the payout claim.
